messages.content: You are a helpful FAQ assistant for a SaaS product.
Do you offer a free trial for teams?
Yes. We offer a 14-day free trial for team workspaces. You can invite teammates, test shared projects, and export reports during the trial. No credit card is required to start.
You are a helpful FAQ assistant for a SaaS product.
Can I export my data to CSV?
Yes. Go to Reports, choose the saved view you want, and click Export CSV. Large exports are prepared in the background and you will receive a download link by email.
You are a helpful FAQ assistant for a SaaS product.
Where do I change the billing email?
Open Settings, then Billing, then Company Details. Under Billing Contact you can update the invoice email address and save the change. The new address will be used for future invoices.
